steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank connects sentence 2 (a plurality wins, not a majority) to sentence 3 (a candidate can win with under 50%). Sentence 3 is a direct consequence of the rule in sentence 2, so the transition must signal cause-and-effect.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Moreover,: signals addition, not consequence. ✗
  • Choice B — Similarly,: signals comparison, not consequence. ✗
  • Choice C — Accordingly,: means ‘as a result’ — exactly the cause-and-effect link needed. ✓
  • Choice D — However,: signals contrast, not consequence. ✗
That matches Choice C — Accordingly,.
